step_rationale: Endothelial target molecule; elevation reflects endothelial dysfunction in acute MI.
mechanism: ACE2 elevation in acute MI reflects endothelial activation and dysfunction; modulates angiotensin signaling and inflammatory responses in the coronary vasculature.
